posts.text:
🚨Sharp Money Tracker🚨
Just a few minutes from puck drop tonight. 15 games, a lot of value.. if you haven’t seen the tool. You’re in for a treat.
We’re monitoring the top bettors on prediction markets, organizing the data so you can see where their action is..
Lets catch fire tonight!!
Drop your plays below, I love a good sweat.
Enable hls playback
[Download video](https://nitter.net/video/CECC87923142E/https%3A%2F%2Fvideo.twimg.com%2Famplify_video%2F2036572394190512128%2Fvid%2Favc1%2F828x1792%2Fo5nGnjy_y3WNWtVI.mp4 "Download video")

moneylines are printing…
> Soccer ML: 17-5 (77%)
MLB ML: our biggest sample of the season, plus 19units..
> Today's card has several stand outs right now led by our biggest play on the board..
> Colombia ML (6u) — 5 proven winners backing it, zero against
Egypt +135 (2.5u) — the plus-money dog the sharps grabbed early, kicks off 
Rays ML
Nationals ML

Let’s get this..bats stay hot.
> Pirates/phillies over 9.5

We're 15-5 betting the World Cup and I couldn't name Austria's starting XI.
> Here...we watch the wallets...a small group of bettors who win year after year, and where their money goes.
> Knockout round today, and they're loud
> Spain, 3pm ET our top play right now. Every proven winner we track is on it. Zero against. 
> +16 units in three weeks doing exactly this.

Yesterday sucked. 5-7 overall but some bright spots.
> Baseball will continue to be high variance with some swings..
> Our world cup sharps though have been quietly cleaning up..actually hit the craziest draw i've seen with Senegal choking that lead.
> Soccer/World Cup
15-5 over the last 9 days
+16.69u
+25.5% ROI
> And since June 1, everything is still +35.39u overall.
> Process continues..

One of the top 10 winners we track just bet almost 2x his normal size..
Nationals/Sox Under 9.5... Zero dissent.
Top pick's the Yankees ML -134...3 proven winners, nobody on the other side.
Let's eat. ⚾

+17 units yesterday.
The hardest part of a huge slate is not giving it back the next day....
So we're not getting cute. Same sharps, same discipline, right back to the well this afternoon..
➡️Under 11.5, Padres/Cubs - 100% of the sharp money
➡️Rangers ML — 4 proven winners, 3 high-conviction
➡️White Sox +123 — 100% sharp money on the dog
Things could change before gametime, so always check the site closer to gametime, and more locked plays are loading for the evening slate!

Stop scrolling. like, follow, bookmark, If you found this account today, you got lucky...
Today's card: 8-3, +8.4 units, +20% ROI...and 6 plays are still live.
The winners:
✅ White Sox +125 (dog)
✅ Norway +115 (dog)
✅ Orioles/White Sox Over 10.5
✅ Washington +117
✅ Rays -114
We didn't get them all... but what a night..

14-7.
That's our top-pick tier this month...and our 6-unit max plays are 2-1 at +52.7% ROI.
Tonight's the heaviest board we've ever had.. 16 plays, four at 5 units. Here are just a few or where are sharps landed..
➡️ Washington +117 — 7 for 0 against.
➡️ Tampa Bay -116 — 4 fo, 1 against.
➡️ Minnesota -110 — clean, no dissent
Every play, every wallet, on the site.

One of these dogs is getting there tonight.
White Sox +120
or
Guardians +110
This SHARP PLAY tier has been a machine this month:
17-10
+16.69u
+16.4% ROI
And these are two of the 13 plays still live tonight.
Sox ML drew the bigger sharp backing.
Guardians ML drew the cleaner agreement.

A lot of people have been wanting this to fail...
4-1 yesterday.
Norway already cashed ✅
Month-to-date: +34.45u, 55.4% win rate.
And now the board is packed...
12 pending plays are live right now...
but check the site before gametime because this sharp tape can change fast.

Tigers/Yankees Under 7.5
Sox ML +120
Nationals ML +117

This is the kind of spot people want to see...
massive sharp agreement
with market resistance.

$213.8K invested
99% of tracked money on Norway
But Pinnacle still opposes the play
and the prediction market ticked against it.

Brazil ✅.
Soccer card's 11-4 this week.
Germany kicks off in 45 minutes....our biggest play left on the board.
❤️ = tail the run with us
🔁 = you're fading, you think it ends here
The timeline goes on record before the whistle.

Nobody's betting the Athletics this afternoon...
No city, no stars, and they lost yesterday
But we don't track the public...we track the wallets that actually win. Every proven winner on this game is on the A's. Not one is fading.
Same model that's 13-5 on its top plays.
A's ML
Tell me I'm crazy. 👇

Before first pitch, I want your answer on this!
Cubs/Brewers 8.5
Over or under?
Reply with your pick before you read any further.
This is the strongest play on our board today.
Every sharp wallet we track landed the same way:
• $19.1K on one side
• 100% sharp money
• zero dissent
• highest-conviction read of the day
First pitch: 2:11 ET.

We're on both. 🐋
Today he loaded:
• Reds/Pirates UNDER 9.5
• Marlins +1.5 and at 3× his usual bet size
Two tickets. Both on our card.
Riding with the whale? 🐋

Uzbekistan vs DR Congo...kicks in ~1 minutes.
• $207K on DR Congo: 79% of every sharp dollar in the match
• 8 proven wallets, led by a +$571K winner who dropped $105K
• The other side? $28K. It's not close.
DR Congo ML -150 (4u). Every wallet is live on the site before kickoff
Tailing the unknown, or fading it? 🎯

And honestly, that’s exactly what we needed.
